top_signals.title: UK eases sanctions on Russian oil refined into jet fuel and diesel
top_signals.summary: Move aims to alleviate supply problems caused by Iran war and echoes similar measures in the US
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Putin: Russia, China Back “Democratic World Order”
top_signals.summary:
President Vladimir Putin praised booming Russia-China trade and energy ties in talks with President Xi Jinping, saying the two countries are working together toward a more "democratic world order."

 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan Trade Minister to Attend APEC in China Amid Strained Ties
top_signals.summary: Japan’s Trade Minister Ryosei Akazawa will attend a gathering of trade chiefs hosted by China this week as Tokyo seeks to keep dialogue open with Beijing amid tense relations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
